name: chartdown-monorepo
description: Chartdown reference implementation workspace ??? see ADR 0007

scripts.build: node build.mjs && tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/render-svg/tsconfig.build.json
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/core && tsc --noEmit -p packages/render-svg && tsc --noEmit -p packages/cli && tsc --noEmit -p packages/browser && tsc --noEmit -p packages/obsidian && tsc --noEmit -p packages/mcp && tsc --noEmit -p packages/action && tsc --noEmit -p playground
